heading: Acceptance of membership
label: 290o Acceptance of membership
text: The President is hereby authorized to accept membership for the United States in the Bank for Economic Cooperation and Development in the Middle East and North Africa (in this subchapter referred to as the “Bank”) provided for by the agreement establishing the Bank (in this subchapter referred to as the “Agreement”), signed on .May 31, 1996
notes: References in TextThis subchapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this title”, meaning title I, § 101(c) [title VII], of div. A of , , , 3009–179, which is classified principally to this subchapter. For complete classification of title I, § 101(c) [title VII], to the Code, see Short Title note below and Tables.Pub. L. 104–208110 Stat. 3009–121Sept. 30, 1996
